Then there's the ice tray. Ice trays are the ones you use to make ice cubes. They usually have multiple compartments, each about the size of a standard ice cube. If you look at a typical plastic ice tray, the individual slots are maybe around 2 cm in width and 3-4 cm in height. So if you need a 2 cm by 10 cm strip, maybe you can get that by cutting along the length of one of the slots. The 10 cm would be the length, which could be possible if the tray is deep enough.
